visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a young woman with long dark hair and light green contact lenses vigorously eating a large plate of reddish noodles and a big fried chicken leg in a bright indoor room. A colorful 'Happiness is happening' poster and a red clock are in the background. (2) The woman transitions to holding a pink SERYBOX brand box and individual sachets in her hands while smiling and winking at the camera. The lighting is bright and even. (3) A brief montage shows the woman outdoors by a lake wearing a tight grey dress, then a mirror selfie in a bathroom wearing pink athletic wear, followed by her consuming the powder from a sachet indoors. (4) A split-screen comparison shows two glasses of dark tea-like liquid. A purple porous object is dipped into both. In the right glass, which is labeled to contain the Korean enzyme, the object visibly breaks down and dissolves more rapidly than in the left glass. (5) The woman returns to the frame holding two different product boxes (pink and purple). She uses exaggerated facial expressions and hand gestures to emphasize the text overlays about pricing and discounts. (6) The final phase shows the woman pointing towards the bottom of the screen where instructions for a group buy are displayed, ending with her smiling and waving one sachet toward the lens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 怎樣吃都不會變🐷. [Logo]: 🇰🇷韓國爆紅「零澱粉酵素」. [Subtitle]: 擔心過年會吃太多?! (2) [Subtitle]: 但韓國酵素也要一起吃! (3) [Subtitle]: 上次全貨售罄的韓國酵素回來了! (4) [Subtitle]: 我近2年都吃穀物酵素管理起來. [Subtitle]: 飯後吃一包就OK✅. (5) [Subtitle]: SERYBOX輕盈酵素. [Subtitle]: 1.幫助轉化澱粉和麵粉. [Subtitle]: 2.輕鬆排除老廢物. (6) [Subtitle]: 愛吃炸的、澱粉、麵食的人. [Subtitle]: 必須要吃這個! (7) [Subtitle]: 吃完酵素不會有囤積的感覺. (8) [Subtitle]: 還有V-line消腫丸 這個也很讚😍. (9) [Variety]: 有環限定「全台最低價」團購. [Variety]: 41折優惠 (最高). (10) [Subtitle]: 其實已經很多人開始囤貨了! (11) [Subtitle]: 記得做這兩個步驟🎁. [Subtitle]: 1.請底下留言, 我會私訊給你告訴優惠連結. [Subtitle]: 2.記得註冊EZWAY認證後, 再下單!. [Slogan]: 蝦皮下單時記得輸入優惠碼「SERYYJ25」. [Subtitle]: 要跟團的人趕快底下留言吧!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark brown hair, light green cosmetic contact lenses, wearing a light blue ribbed long-sleeve top indoors and various outfits (grey dress, pink sportswear) in short cutaway scenes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary location is a brightly lit indoor room with a white wall, a red analog clock, and a vibrant 'Happiness is Happening' rainbow poster. Secondary scenes include a scenic lakeside with a city skyline in the distance and a modern bathroom with a large mirror.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin over an upbeat, electronic pop BGM. A 'whoosh' transition effect occurs immediately. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound accompanies the appearance of text on screen, while the BGM maintains a steady 128 BPM pulse. (3) A 'bubble pop' sound effect is heard during the dissolution demo, emphasizing the chemical reaction visually presented. (4) The speaker's arousal increases during the promotional offer section, with multiple fast UI 'clicks' and 'dings' triggered by graphic overlays. (5) The track concludes with a final energetic vocal phrase and a stylized 'stinger' sound effect that fades with the music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Solution -> Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote SERYBOX Korean enzyme supplements by first creating a relatable 'pain point' (eating heavy meals like fried chicken and noodles during the New Year) and then presenting the product as an effective weight management solution through personal testimony and a visual experiment. It concludes with a high-incentive limited-time group buy discount and clear purchase instructions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly shows the product boxes, demonstrates the product effect, mentions a specific group buy discount code, and provides a 'limited time' call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-conversion social media advertisement combining mukbang elements with product demonstration and a structured sales funnel.
